title: pelargonium × rhodopetalon
intro: Pelargonium × rhodopetalon, also known as Rose-scented Geranium, is a hybrid plant species belonging to the Geraniaceae family, derived from the cross between Pelargonium graveolens and Pelargonium capitatum. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties, which make it effective against various health issues. The health benefits of Rose-scented Geranium include relief from stress, anxiety, and insomnia, as well as its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive problems. The herbal preparation of Pelargonium × rhodopetalon is often made into essential oils, teas, and infusions, which can be used topically or ingested to harness its medicinal properties.
